title: trisetum spicatum var. maidenii
intro: Trisetum spicatum var. maidenii, also known as Spear Grass, is a type of grass native to Australia, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trisetum spicatum var. maidenii include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
